Personal Planner

Personal Planner

Personal Planner is a cross-platform application for managing tasks, habits, and vacations.

Overview

Personal Planner allows users to:

  • Manage daily tasks

  • Track weekly habits

  • Plan vacations and trips (Desktop only)

  • Select specific dates for planning

  • Use a modern UI built with KivyMD

Platforms

Desktop Application

  • Full-featured with To-Do, Habits, and Vacation Planning modules

  • Runs natively using KivyMD

Web Application

  • Includes To-Do and Habits modules

  • Shared service layer ensures consistent logic across platforms

Architecture

The application follows a layered architecture:

  • UI Layer – Screens and widgets (KivyMD)

  • Service Layer – Business logic (TaskServices, VacationServices)

  • Data Layer – Storage and persistence

Modules:

  • core package
    • core.db package
    • core.services package
  • models package
    • models.task module
    • models.vacation module
  • ui package
    • ui.components package
    • ui.screens package
  • main module
    • PersonalPlannerApp
  • web main module
    • Habit
    • Task
    • add_habit()
    • add_task()
    • delete_habit()
    • delete_task()
    • get_habits()
    • get_tasks()
    • mark_task_done()
    • toggle_day()
  • Web Frontend
    • Todo Page
